context: Tests matchmaking metadata configuration in onCreate, server-enforced turn-order constraints in message handlers, and correct Schema design. Also checks that reconnection timeouts match the skill's recommended range for ranked mode (10-15 seconds).

checklist.name: Metadata set in onCreate
checklist.description: onCreate calls this.setMetadata() (or equivalent) with mode and region values from the options parameter

checklist.name: Metadata from options
checklist.description: Metadata values are derived from the onCreate options object — not hardcoded constants

checklist.name: Schema fields decorated
checklist.description: DuelPlayer fields (score, hand size, etc.) use @type decorator — no plain class properties for gameplay-critical values

checklist.name: MapSchema for players
checklist.description: DuelState uses MapSchema<DuelPlayer> for the players collection, keyed by sessionId

checklist.name: Turn order tracked
checklist.description: Room tracks whose turn it is — either via a currentTurn field in state or an internal server variable

checklist.name: Turn order enforced
checklist.description: playCard handler checks whether it is the sending client's turn and returns early / ignores the message if not

checklist.name: Ranked reconnection timeout
checklist.description: If reconnection is implemented, timeout is in the 10-15 second range (appropriate for ranked mode)

checklist.name: All hooks present
checklist.description: Room implements onCreate, onJoin, onLeave, and onDispose
